name: Pie
notes: Pie is an IRL social events app using the pumpkinpie.com domain. HQ Chicago, IL. TechCrunch article confirms identity.

name: Oscar
notes: Oscar AI (formerly Azalio) is an AI platform for QSR restaurant operators, headquartered in Washington DC. Founded 2022.

name: Atypical
notes: Atypical Ventures is a pre-seed/seed VC firm in New York founded 2019, investing $500K-$1M in technical founders. Domain atypical.vc matches.

name: Fambot
notes: Fambot is an AI assistant for school emails and family communication. HQ at 95 3rd St, 2nd floor, San Francisco, CA 94103. Founded 2025.

name: Queen One
notes: All fields already populated; echoed back unchanged.

name: Andrew
notes: andrew.cmu.edu is Carnegie Mellon University's Andrew computing/directory system. CMU is headquartered in Pittsburgh, PA. Classified as EdTech as a university computing platform.

name: Levr
notes: Levr.ai is a Vancouver, BC, Canada-based fintech company helping businesses access and manage loans. Foreign HQ — city/state left null.

name: Hometeamlive
notes: HomeTeam Live is headquartered in Regina, Saskatchewan, Canada. Amateur sports broadcast streaming platform. Foreign HQ — city/state left null.

name: Bettercharge
notes: Bettercharge Ltd (BtrCharge Ltd) is registered in Tel Aviv-Jaffa, Israel. Payment recovery fintech. Remote-first team. Foreign HQ — city/state left null.

name: Vanguarddefense
notes: Vanguard Defense is a data observability company for defense contractors and government AI, HQ West Covina, CA. Founded 2024 by Johnny Ni. Raised $5M seed in March 2026.

name: Virnika
notes: Virnika is a conversational voice AI for restaurants (phone orders, reservations, upselling). HQ at 136 E Rosemary St, Chapel Hill, NC 27514. Founded 2023.

name: Loman
notes: Loman AI is a 24/7 AI phone agent for restaurants — handles calls, takes orders, answers questions, books reservations. HQ Austin, TX.
